name: Trend Micro Cloud One
description: Comprehensive cloud security platform including Conformity (CSPM), Workload Security (CWPP), Container Security, and File Storage Security via REST APIs

auth_config.note: Use API key from Cloud One console with api-version header set to v1

actions.name: List Checks
actions.description: Retrieve compliance checks across cloud accounts with severity and category filters

parameters.name: filter[riskLevels]
parameters.description: Comma-separated risk levels (EXTREME, VERY_HIGH, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW)

parameters.name: filter[categories]
parameters.description: Comma-separated categories (security, cost-optimisation, reliability, performance-efficiency, operational-excellence)

actions.name: Get Check Details
actions.description: Get detailed information about a specific compliance check

parameters.name: checkId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the check

actions.name: List Accounts
actions.description: List all cloud accounts registered in Cloud One Conformity

actions.name: Get Account Compliance
actions.description: Retrieve compliance summary and score for a specific cloud account

actions.name: List Profiles
actions.description: List compliance profiles and their associated rules

actions.name: List Workload Computers
actions.description: List protected workload computers and their security module status

actions.name: Suppress Check
actions.description: Suppress a specific compliance check finding with a note

parameters.name: checkId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the check to suppress

parameters.name: suppressedUntil
parameters.description: Epoch timestamp for when suppression expires
